headline: External audit of UnitedHealth senior home visits finds most diagnoses supported by medical data
summary: HouseCalls has been accused of generating trumped up diagnoses to hike UnitedHealth’s Medicare reimbursement. But the review found almost 97% of diagnoses found in the home visits were backed up by patients’ medical records, UnitedHealth said.

raw.headline: External audit of UnitedHealth senior home visits finds most diagnoses supported by medical data
raw.summary: HouseCalls has been accused of generating trumped up diagnoses to hike UnitedHealth’s Medicare reimbursement. But the review found almost 97% of diagnoses found in the home visits were backed up by patients’ medical records, UnitedHealth said.

headline: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Opens Shield Blood Test Coverage For Adults 45 And Older
summary: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) has become the first major commercial insurer to cover Guardant Health's Shield blood test for early colorectal cancer screening. The new coverage applies to eligible adults aged 45 and older, expanding access to a blood-based alternative to traditional screening methods. For investors watching UnitedHealth Group, this coverage decision highlights how the insurer is using its scale to shape access to emerging screening tools. The stock last closed at $417.99,...
